message:
fix: harden Dolt server ownership detection (PR #2776)

Replace 4 duplicated inline ownership checks with single
doltProcessMatchesTown() predicate. Evidence hierarchy:
--data-dir > --config > cwd > state file. Default-deny when
all evidence is empty.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2776
Author: Henry-E

Co-Authored-By: Henry-E <12613144+Henry-E@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
